content_blocks.hs_subtext: Not sure if your health insurance covers rehab? {business} is a free, confidential service that helps you verify your addiction treatment benefits and find care that works with your plan — for any major insurer.
content_blocks.hs_photo_alt: Checking health insurance coverage for addiction treatment and rehab

content_blocks.fc_subheading: Most health plans include some level of rehab coverage. Here is what to know before you commit to anything.

columns.alt: Insurance parity protections for addiction and mental-health treatment
columns.heading: Parity Protections
columns.text: Federal law requires most health plans to cover substance-use and mental-health treatment comparably to other medical care.

columns.alt: Types of addiction treatment commonly covered by insurance
columns.heading: What Is Often Covered
columns.text: Detox, inpatient and residential rehab, PHP and IOP, outpatient care, and medication-assisted treatment are commonly covered, subject to your plan.

columns.alt: Verifying rehab benefits before entering treatment
columns.heading: Verify Before You Go
columns.text: Coverage varies by plan, deductible, and network. A quick benefits check shows what you would actually pay out of pocket.

steps_items.alt: Call for a free insurance benefits check
steps_items.heading: Call for a Free Benefits Check
steps_items.text: Share your insurance details. There is no cost and no obligation.

steps_items.alt: We verify your addiction treatment coverage
steps_items.heading: We Verify Your Coverage
steps_items.text: We confirm what your plan covers for addiction treatment and what you would pay.

steps_items.alt: Get matched to covered treatment options
steps_items.heading: Get Matched to Covered Care
steps_items.text: We connect you with treatment options that work with your insurance.

fq_items.question: Does health insurance cover rehab?
fq_items.answer: Most plans cover at least part of addiction treatment because of federal parity and ACA rules. The exact amount depends on your specific plan, and {business} can verify your benefits for free.

fq_items.question: Which insurance companies cover addiction treatment?
fq_items.answer: Major carriers including Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, and Blue Cross Blue Shield commonly include rehab benefits. Choose your carrier from the list below to learn more.

fq_items.question: How much does rehab cost with insurance?
fq_items.answer: It depends on your deductible, copay, and whether the facility is in-network. Many people pay far less than the sticker price once benefits are applied.

fq_items.question: Is checking my coverage confidential?
fq_items.answer: Yes. It is free, private, and there is no obligation to enter treatment.

content_blocks.cb_text: Find out what your insurance covers for addiction treatment.

seo.meta_description: Does your insurance cover rehab? {business} helps you verify addiction treatment benefits for major carriers, free and confidential. Check your coverage now.

content_blocks.hs_subtext: Wondering whether {company} covers addiction treatment? {business} helps you confirm your {company} rehab benefits — detox, inpatient, and outpatient — and find care that accepts your plan. Free, confidential, no obligation.
content_blocks.hs_photo_alt: {company} insurance coverage for rehab and addiction treatment

content_blocks.fc_heading: What {company} May Cover for Addiction Treatment
content_blocks.fc_subheading: Coverage depends on your specific {company} plan. Here is what these plans often include.

columns.heading: Medical Detox
columns.text: Supervised detox is commonly covered when it is medically necessary.

columns.heading: Inpatient and Residential
columns.text: Many {company} plans include residential rehab, subject to your plan terms.

columns.heading: Outpatient (PHP and IOP)
columns.text: Day programs and intensive outpatient are frequently covered options.

columns.heading: MAT and Dual Diagnosis
columns.text: Medication-assisted treatment and co-occurring mental-health care may be included.

steps_items.alt: Call for a free {company} benefits check
steps_items.heading: Call for a Free Benefits Check
steps_items.text: Tell us your {company} plan details. There is no cost and no obligation.

steps_items.heading: We Verify Your {company} Coverage
steps_items.text: We confirm what your {company} plan covers for addiction treatment.

steps_items.alt: Get matched to treatment that accepts {company}
steps_items.heading: Get Matched to Covered Care
steps_items.text: We connect you with treatment options that accept {company}.

fq_items.question: Does {company} cover rehab?
fq_items.answer: In most cases {company} plans include some coverage for addiction treatment, because federal law requires most health plans to treat substance-use care like other medical care. Exact benefits depend on your specific {company} plan, and we can verify yours for free.

fq_items.question: What addiction treatment does {company} cover?
fq_items.answer: Depending on your plan, {company} may cover detox, inpatient and residential rehab, partial hospitalization (PHP), intensive outpatient (IOP), outpatient care, and medication-assisted treatment.

fq_items.question: How much will treatment cost with {company}?
fq_items.answer: Out-of-pocket costs depend on your deductible, copay, and whether the facility is in-network. We can help you understand your {company} benefits before you commit.

fq_items.question: Do I have to use an in-network facility?
fq_items.answer: In-network care usually costs less, but many plans include some out-of-network benefits. We can review your {company} plan and explain your options.

content_blocks.text: Disclaimer: {business} is a free informational and referral service, not a treatment provider or insurance company. {company} is a trademark of its owner, and {business} is not affiliated with or endorsed by {company}. Coverage varies by plan, so always verify your own benefits. If you are in crisis, call or text 988.
